title: Insufficient Funds
description: The payment method has insufficient funds to cover the requested amount.
resolution: Ask the customer to use a different payment method or reduce the amount.

title: Card Declined
description: The issuing bank declined the card. The decline reason is returned in `decline_code`.
resolution: Surface a generic failure to the customer and prompt for an alternative method. Do not retry the same card automatically.

title: Idempotency Key Conflict
description: The supplied `Idempotency-Key` was already used with a different request body.
resolution: Generate a fresh idempotency key per logical operation; never reuse a key across different payloads.

title: Validation Error
description: The request body failed validation — e.g. `amount` below the minimum or an unknown `currency`.
resolution: Inspect the `errors[]` array in the response; each entry names the offending field and constraint.

title: Unauthorized
description: The bearer token is missing, malformed, or expired.
resolution: Refresh the token and resend the request with a valid `Authorization: Bearer` header.
